title: ExampleScore
description: INTERNAL per-example scoring record. The per-example tuning signals below are proprietary and are NOT returned to clients; the API returns only non-signal metadata (example_id, sample_count, algorithm_version, timestamps). Signal field semantics and formulas are intentionally not documented here. Signal-driven guidance is delivered to clients via the GuidancePlan API.

id.description: Unique identifier for this score record

experiment_run_id.description: ID of the experiment run this example belongs to

example_id.description: Stable, deterministic ID for the example (format: ex_{hash}_{index})

content_uniqueness.description: Internal content-feature score in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

content_novelty.description: Internal content-feature score in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

informativeness.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

consistency.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

difficulty.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

discriminative_power.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

cost_efficiency.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

error_sensitivity.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

predictive_value.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

ambiguity.description: Internal scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

composite_score.description: Internal composite scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

sample_count.description: Number of trials this example was evaluated in (more samples = more reliable scores)

algorithm_version.description: Version of the scoring algorithm used (e.g., '1.0.0')

created_at.description: Timestamp when this score was computed

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this score was last updated
